bird.name: New Britain bronzewing
bird.summary: The New Britain bronzewing (Henicophaps foersteri) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea.

relations.subject: New Britain bronzewing
relations.evidence: However, in 2000, it was warranted a vulnerable status due to its small population numbering less than 5,000, which is probably decreasing due to habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: New Britain bronzewing
relations.evidence: However, in 2000, it was warranted a vulnerable status due to its small population numbering less than 5,000, which is probably decreasing due to habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
